title: Domain Registry
description: Registry of recognized domains for a project. Domain codes are used in the `domain` frontmatter field across all artifacts.

id.description: Unique identifier for this domain registry, e.g. META-TAXONOMY-DOMAINS or META-TAXONOMY-DOMAINS-DBP

updated.description: Date of last update in YYYY-MM-DD format

code.description: Short uppercase domain code used in artifact IDs and frontmatter, e.g. INGEST, SEC, UI

full_name.description: Human-readable domain name, e.g. 'Data Ingestion & Validation'

description.description: What this domain covers — scope, responsibilities, key concerns
